title: Make Scenario in Marketplace?
excerpt: If I create a Make.com scenario which may be of interest to others, is there a way to offer that in the Monday.com App marketplace?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: If I create a Make.com scenario which may be of interest to others, is there a way to offer that in the Monday.com App marketplace?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@rkaplan ,

Currently, there is no direct way to offer a Make.com scenario in the Monday.com App Marketplace. However, you can use:
Create a Monday.com app
You can create a Monday.com app that wraps your Make.com scenario. This will allow you to publish your scenario to the Monday.com App Marketplace and make it available to other users.
